title: GKA (Local Policy)
description: This policy governs the rules of conduct for members of the public when they are on school district property or attending school-sponsored events. It applies to community members, visitors, and anyone who interacts with the district in a public setting. Parents and community members should be aware of this policy because it outlines expectations for behavior on campus, including an updated ban on tobacco products, e-cigarettes, and electronic vaporizing devices, helping ensure a safe and healthy environment for students and staff.

timeline_local.summary: The board adopted a revision to add or strengthen a prohibition on the possession or use of cigarettes, e-cigarettes, tobacco products, and similar products (as defined by Health and Safety Code §161.081) on District property or at school-related/sanctioned events on or off school property. This applies to the general public/visitors, paralleling the employee prohibition adopted in DH.
changes_added: The District prohibits the possession or use of cigarettes, e-cigarettes, or tobacco products, as defined by Health and Safety Code §161.081 or similar product, on District property or on or off school property at a school-related or school sanctioned event or activity.
timeline_local.notes: Adopted at the December 16, 2025 regular board meeting via two motions (Motion #7303 and Motion #7304), both carried unanimously 6-0. Minutes approved January 20, 2026. No specific removal language was described in the minutes; the amendment language may have replaced or supplemented existing tobacco language. The removal list is left empty as no specific deletions were stated.

timeline_local.summary: Policy GKA is being updated to expand the tobacco prohibition language. The existing prohibition on 'tobacco products and e-cigarettes' is being amended to also explicitly include 'electronic vaporizing devices' on District property, in District vehicles, or at school-related activities.

### GKA Local — Community Relations/Conduct on School Premises
- Updates regarding advertising consistency with district values.
- Adds e-cigarette/vaporizer devices to prohibited items on premises.
- **Trustee noted inconsistency:** Previous policy (DH) uses "nicotine" while this uses "tobacco." Requested language be made consistent — Dr. Vinson to research and update for second reading.

description_local: This policy governs how members of the public are expected to behave when on school district property, including rules about prohibited items such as tobacco products and e-cigarettes. It applies to anyone who visits or spends time on school campuses or other district facilities, not just students and staff. Parents and community members should be aware of this policy because it sets clear expectations for conduct on school grounds and helps ensure a safe environment for everyone, particularly children.
